input_summary.description: Analysis of a plus-size model wearing a bronze sequin top and brown wide-leg trousers.

module_output.merge_summary: Successfully merged scene, camera, and pose directives. Conflict resolution applied: ensured arms do not obscure the sequin texture in studio shots, and adjusted camera angle in lifestyle shots to capture the trouser drape.

prompt_variations.name: Urban Night Lifestyle (Full Pipeline)
prompt_variations.final_prompt: A high-quality fashion photography shot of a beautiful plus-size model wearing a short-sleeve metallic bronze sequin top and brown tailored wide-leg trousers. She is standing outside a luxury cocktail bar at night with street lights creating beautiful bokeh in the background. Warm amber ambient lighting. The camera angle is a medium-full shot from a slightly low angle using a 50mm lens to emphasize the drape of the trousers. She is in a relaxed pose with one hand in her pocket, weight shifted to one leg. Photorealistic, premium, evening wear style.

prompt_variations.name: Premium Editorial Studio (Full Pipeline)
prompt_variations.final_prompt: A premium editorial fashion photography shot of a beautiful plus-size model wearing a short-sleeve metallic bronze sequin top and brown tailored wide-leg trousers. Shot in a dark charcoal infinity curve studio. Dramatic spotlighting with high contrast to make the sequins sparkle. The camera angle is a medium close-up at eye level using an 85mm lens, focusing sharply on the sequin texture. She is standing in a confident posture, arms slightly away from the body to reveal the silhouette, chin slightly up. High-end, moody, photorealistic.
